description: FGAP-074 C0 — naming DEC (decision-only, no code). Settle target names for the /project->/context surface rename: the 3 src filenames (project-dir.ts / project-context.ts / project-sdk.ts -> new) + their 3 subpath exports; identifier scheme (projectRoot->contextRoot, projectDir->contextDir [collision-scoped per feedback_rename_scope_discipline], projectState->contextState, validateProject->validateContext|validateSubstrate, getProjectContext->getContext, installProject->installContext, projectTemplatesDir->contextTemplatesDir, PROJECT_BLOCK_TYPES->CONTEXT_BLOCK_TYPES, interfaces Project*->Context*/Substrate*, PROJECT_DIR @deprecated -> drop|rename); Pi tool prefix project-* -> context-*; command /project -> /context + PROJECT_SUBCOMMANDS rename. Resolve the project-context.ts target-name hazard (context-context is awkward: choose context-core|context-substrate|context.ts). Gates C1-C7.
acceptance_criteria: A DEC is filed settling: 3 target filenames, 3 target subpath strings, the full identifier rename map, the tool-prefix scheme, and the command name
project-context.ts target name chosen (resolves the context-context awkwardness hazard)
DEC notes the DEC-0044/FEAT-004 constraint: keep a /context dispatch-verb namespace open (do not foreclose an agent-dispatch tool/command)
DEC notes OUT-of-scope: package name @davidorex/pi-project-workflows, the .project substrate-dir literal (DEC-0036 step-5), user-substrate vocabulary (DEC-0025), already-context-named symbols
Decision-only: no source code changes in this chunk
notes: Decomposition: analysis/2026-05-23-fgap-074-rename-decomposition.md (chunk C0). Maps to Claude Code task #59. FGAP-074. Transition-alias-bridged strategy; each subsequent chunk green-per-commit (husky check+test). Independent of DEC-0036 step-3/.context re-population — pure source codemod against the still-.project substrate via the pointer.
